summary: Nematodes lack a functional CTCF gene, supported by recent genomic analysis indicating its absence across sequenced genomes. This reflects an evolutionarily reduced chromatin regulatory system absent in more complex eukaryotes.
formatted_summary: agent1 (Round 2 summarized): Nematodes lack a functional CTCF gene, supported by recent genomic analysis indicating its absence across sequenced genomes. This reflects an evolutionarily reduced chromatin regulatory system absent in more complex eukaryotes.. Answer choice: B
